About

Strategy first, pixels second.

Strategic Brand & Creative Lead with 5+ years building and scaling consumer brands across e-commerce, FMCG, and logistics. I've launched brands from zero, developed 30+ physical products, and built high-converting visual ecosystems for Shopee and TikTok Shop.

My Information Systems background means I don't just design the brand — I help build the commercial and technical systems behind it: product development, manufacturer coordination, and now, a full e-commerce platform from the ground up.
